title: Villadia albiflora
taxonomy: Villadia albiflora is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Crassulaceae. It belongs to the genus Villadia, which is a group of succulent plants native to Mexico. The family Crassulaceae is a large and diverse group of plants that also includes species such as jade plants and stonecrops. Villadia albiflora is a rare and unique species within this family, known for its distinctive white flowers. The classification of Villadia albiflora is further supported by its shared characteristics with other members of the Crassulaceae family.
